title: OCC Proposal Aims to Fuel Safe Payment Stablecoin Growth
message_html: OCC Proposal Aims to Fuel Safe Payment Stablecoin Growth ...
snippet: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has issued a proposed rulemaking to implement the GENIUS Act, the stablecoin legislation that was signed into law by President Donald Trump in July 2025. The proposed rule addresses most of the regulations the OCC is required to implement under the
